name: INCOMING: the game
overview: the horrifying and suspense-filled world of a deadly survival game that pulls six teenagers from various backgrounds into a nightmare. After a humiliating incident at his high school reunion, Bright, a brilliant but financially struggling teen, is lured into an Instagram ad that promises an easy way to make money. What he doesn’t know is that this click will entrap him and his friends into a game with no rules, where survival becomes the ultimate goal. As the game starts to haunt them in their everyday lives, the teens must navigate challenges, betrayals, and deadly consequences while trying to uncover the mystery behind the sinister game.
